_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL EGGS
name: NeoForge + SpongeNeo (Packwiz)
author: benjamincunningham96@gmail.com
description: Boots a NeoForge server with SpongeNeo for plugin support, syncing the modpack from a packwiz manifest on every start. Designed for the [DBAH] Organized Crime pack at https://bennysc.github.io/oc/pack.toml.
startup: sleep 1; java -jar packwiz-installer-bootstrap.jar -g -s server "{{PACKWIZ_URL}}"; java -Xms128M -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=95.0 --add-modules=jdk.incubator.vector -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200 -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:G1HeapWastePercent=5 -XX:G1MixedGCCountTarget=4 -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent=15 -XX:G1MixedGCLiveThresholdPercent=90 -XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent=5 -XX:SurvivorRatio=32 -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:MaxTenuringThreshold=1 -Dusing.aikars.flags=https://mcflags.emc.gs -Daikars.new.flags=true -XX:G1NewSizePercent=30 -XX:G1MaxNewSizePercent=40 -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=8M -XX:G1ReservePercent=20 -Dterminal.jline=false -Dterminal.ansi=true $( [[ ! -f unix_args.txt ]] && printf %s "-jar mc-wrapper.jar" || printf %s "@unix_args.txt" ) --nogui

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

apt update -qq
apt install -y -qq curl jq ca-certificates

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. NeoForge
#    NEOFORGE_VERSION must be the full build number (e.g. 21.1.211).
#    SpongeNeo pins to a specific NeoForge build, so do not bump this without
#    bumping SPONGENEO_VERSION to a build that targets the same NeoForge.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
NEOFORGE_INSTALLER_URL="https://maven.neoforged.net/releases/net/neoforged/neoforge/${NEOFORGE_VERSION}/neoforge-${NEOFORGE_VERSION}-installer.jar"
echo "[install] downloading NeoForge ${NEOFORGE_VERSION}"
curl -sSL --fail -o /tmp/neoforge-installer.jar "$NEOFORGE_INSTALLER_URL"
echo "[install] running NeoForge --install-server"
java -jar /tmp/neoforge-installer.jar --install-server /mnt/server
rm -f /tmp/neoforge-installer.jar run.sh run.bat user_jvm_args.txt

if [ ! -f /mnt/server/unix_args.txt ]; then
    UNIX_ARGS=$(find /mnt/server/libraries -name 'unix_args.txt' | head -n1 || true)
    if [ -n "$UNIX_ARGS" ]; then
        cp "$UNIX_ARGS" /mnt/server/unix_args.txt
    fi
fi

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. SpongeNeo
#    SPONGENEO_VERSION is the middle of the jar name, e.g. 1.21.1-21.1.211-12.0.3.
#    Maven path: org/spongepowered/spongeneo/<version>/spongeneo-<version>-universal.jar
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
mkdir -p /mnt/server/mods /mnt/server/plugins
SPONGE_JAR="spongeneo-${SPONGENEO_VERSION}-universal.jar"
SPONGE_URL="https://repo.spongepowered.org/repository/maven-releases/org/spongepowered/spongeneo/${SPONGENEO_VERSION}/${SPONGE_JAR}"
echo "[install] downloading SpongeNeo ${SPONGENEO_VERSION}"
curl -sSL --fail -o "/mnt/server/mods/${SPONGE_JAR}" "$SPONGE_URL"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. packwiz-installer-bootstrap (latest release)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "[install] downloading packwiz-installer-bootstrap"
BOOT_URL=$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/packwiz/packwiz-installer-bootstrap/releases/latest \
    | jq -r '.assets[] | select(.name | endswith(".jar")) | .browser_download_url' | head -n1)
curl -sSL --fail -o /mnt/server/packwiz-installer-bootstrap.jar "$BOOT_URL"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. EULA
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
if [ "${EULA:-false}" = "true" ]; then
    echo 'eula=true' > /mnt/server/eula.txt
fi

echo "[install] done. NeoForge + SpongeNeo + packwiz bootstrap staged."

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: Minecraft version. Locked to 1.21.1 for the current SpongeNeo LTS API 12 line.

variables.name: NeoForge Version
variables.description: NeoForge build (e.g. 21.1.211). MUST match the NeoForge build that the chosen SpongeNeo build targets — see https://dl.spongepowered.org/spongeneo for the pairing.

variables.name: SpongeNeo Version
variables.description: Middle of the SpongeNeo jar filename, e.g. 1.21.1-21.1.211-12.0.3 for spongeneo-1.21.1-21.1.211-12.0.3-universal.jar. Picked from https://dl.spongepowered.org/spongeneo.

variables.name: Packwiz Manifest URL
variables.description: URL of the packwiz pack.toml. Pulled on every server start so mod updates ship without a reinstall.

variables.name: Accept EULA
variables.description: Set to true to write eula=true on install. By accepting you agree to the Minecraft EULA at https://aka.ms/MinecraftEULA.
